boundary: repository runtime composition ownership and capability exposure

decisions.subject: concrete repository runtime assembly
decisions.reason: blackcell.bootstrap.repository is now the sole owner of store, journal, gateway, adapter, workflow, and replay construction for the repository runtime.

decisions.subject: RepositoryOperator application facade
decisions.reason: The facade remains the product use-case boundary but consumes composed capabilities instead of constructing infrastructure.

decisions.subject: API and worker store reach-through
decisions.reason: RuntimeApiService receives EventStore and RuntimeWorker receives ArtifactStore explicitly; RepositoryOperator exposes neither store publicly.

decisions.subject: repository subprocess, model, execution, and observation adapters
decisions.reason: Concrete repository implementations now reside under blackcell.adapters.repository.

after.capability_binding: API event storage and worker artifact storage must match the operator database and artifact root
after.shutdown_contract: unchanged; no resource lifecycle was invented by this refactor

explicitly_changed: Direct Python construction moves from RepositoryOperator(...) to compose_repository_runtime(...).operator.
Concrete RepositoryStatusReader imports move from blackcell.operator to blackcell.adapters.repository.
compatibility_decision: The retired constructor and adapter import paths are internal composition surfaces, not preserved CLI or HTTP contracts. Retaining shims would reintroduce the concrete operator-to-adapter dependency and the false boundary AC01 removes.
explicitly_unchanged: DailyOperatorV2 event names, payloads, ordering, and artifact codecs
CLI, HTTP, worker, correction, and disaster-recovery behavior

verification.focused: uv run pytest -q tests/unit/test_operator_facade.py tests/unit/test_runtime_worker.py tests/unit/test_transition_prediction.py tests/integration/test_runtime_disaster_recovery.py tests/integration/test_otel_export.py tests/integration/test_runtime_api.py tests/architecture/test_dependencies.py
verification.focused_result: 26 passed before the architecture assertion was added
